# Data Source: okta_resource_set

Use this data source to retrieve a Resource Set from Okta.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "okta_resource_set" "example" {
  id = "<resource_set_id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the Resource Set.

### Read-Only

- `label` (String) Unique name given to the Resource Set.
- `description` (String) A description of the Resource Set.
- `resources` (List of String) The resources included in the Resource Set. Each entry is the self-link href of the resource.
